nodes.title: Dummy English Class
nodes.content: An introductory course to fundamental concepts of the English language.

nodes.title: Unit 1 - Alphabet
nodes.content: Explores the basic symbolic components of the English writing system.

nodes.title: Unit 2 - Words
nodes.content: Focuses on how letters combine to form meaningful units and phrases.

nodes.title: Alphabet Definition
nodes.content: The complete ordered set of letters used in the English language.

nodes.title: Letter Definition
nodes.content: A fundamental written symbol representing a specific sound within a language.

nodes.title: Word Definition
nodes.content: A collection of one or more letters arranged to convey a specific meaning.

nodes.title: Sentence Definition
nodes.content: A collection of words organized to express a complete thought or meaning.
